title: Intent Audit
description: Records human decisions and their context. Only the orchestrator writes to this. Captures what was presented to the human and what they decided.

stage.description: Which stage this decision relates to

presented.description: What was shown to the human (e.g. 'clarification questions Q1-Q8', 'composed workflow with 3 stages', 'final requirements document')

decision.description: What the human said/decided (e.g. 'approved', 'answered Q1:d, Q2:a, Q3:c...', 'rejected — missing NFRs')
